summary: Tested Admin Orders and Products Management APIs and Frontend. All 5 new backend APIs working correctly. Frontend OrdersTab and ProductsTab components functioning properly with modals for actions.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend APIs (admin.py lines 2533-2911): All 5 new APIs implemented correctly with proper authentication, validation, and notifications
OrdersTab.js: Uses modals instead of window.confirm for cancel/status change actions. Includes proper error handling and toast notifications
ProductsTab.js: Uses modals for delete confirmation. Toggle visibility and delete actions properly integrated with backend APIs

POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/cancel.notes: Cancels order, sends notifications to customer/seller/driver

POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/status.notes: Changes order status with validation for valid statuses

POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/refund.notes: Full refund to customer wallet with transaction logging

DELETE /api/admin/products/{id}.notes: Deletes product, removes from favorites/carts, notifies seller

features: Order list with status filters (all, pending, paid, on_the_way, delivered, cancelled)
Order details modal with customer info, delivery address, products, financial summary
Change Status modal with status options (confirmed, processing, ready, on_the_way, delivered)
Cancel Order modal with reason selection and admin notes
Product grid with filters (all, hidden, low_stock)
Product menu with options (view details, hide/show, delete)
Product details modal with action buttons (hide/show product, delete product)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin order/product management APIs and frontend components tested and working. 17 backend tests passed. Frontend uses modals instead of window.confirm for all destructive actions.
